title: RDVV Time Table 2026 LL.M III Semester Revised Exam Schedule Out

detail.title: RDVV Time Table 2026 LL.M III Semester Revised Exam Schedule Out
detail.short_info: RDVV Time Table 2026 revised for LL.M III Semester exams. Check new exam date (11 May), subject-wise changes, timing, and download PDF at rdunijbpin.org.

sections.heading: RDVV Time Table 2026 LL.M III Semester Revised Exam Schedule Out

content.text: Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalaya (RDVV), Jabalpur has officially released the revised RDVV Time Table 2026 for LL.M. III Semester (Regular, Ex and ATKT) Examinations 2025-26. The new exam date for multiple optional papers is 11 May 2026. Students can download the official notification PDF from the university website rdunijbpin.org.
The examination will be conducted from 07:00 A.M. to 10:00 A.M. Students are advised to check the revised schedule carefully and prepare accordingly.
Download RDVV LL.M III Semester Time Table 2026 PDF

links.text: Download RDVV LL.M III Semester Time Table 2026 PDF

content.text: Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalaya has issued the revised RDVV Time Table 2026 for LL.M Third Semester students. The notification brings a change in the examination date for several optional groups under the 2025-26 session.

Check the complete revised schedule for LL.M III Semester examinations 2025-26 as per the latest RDVV Time Table 2026. The university has postponed the exam from 06 May to 11 May 2026 for the following optional papers.

rows: (Human Rights) International Humanitarian Law & Refugee Law

sections.heading: How to Download RDVV Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the RDVV Time Table 2026 PDF from the official university website. Follow these simple steps to get your copy instantly.

items: Visit the official website of Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalaya at rdunijbpin.org.
Navigate to the "Examination" or "Notice Board" section on the homepage.
Look for the latest notification titled "REVISED Programme of The LL.M. III Semester Exam 2025-26".
Click on the link to open the PDF file.
Download and save the timetable PDF on your device.
Take a printout for future reference and exam preparation.

content.text: Students should verify all details mentioned in the official timetable and keep a copy handy during the examination period.
Download Official RDVV Time Table 2026 PDF

links.text: Download Official RDVV Time Table 2026 PDF

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in RDVV Time Table 2026

content.text: The official RDVV Time Table 2026 notification contains important information for LL.M III Semester students appearing in the 2025-26 examinations.

items: Revised examination date for multiple optional groups
Previous scheduled date for comparison
Exact subject names with group details
Paper code and optional group information
Examination timing - 7 AM to 10 AM
Notification number and release date (24 April 2026)
Official instructions and distribution list.
